sections.sectionTitle: Pasian' Minthan'na Vang in Biakinn Nusia

verses.text: Tua ciangin kherub-te' lu tung sanah a om a kuum ka et leh sapfaia suangmanpha tawh a kibawl kumpi tokhom bang pian khat, tua a kuum tungah a om hi

Tua ciangin Pasian in saihadial puan a silhpa kiangah, “Na khut dimin mei-am tawi in la, kherub nuai-a om leengpeite kikalah va om in. Tua ciangin khuapi tungah a mei-amte theh in,” ci-in a sawl hi. * Kei zong ama pai ka en gige hi
Tua ciangin mipa a pai laitakin kherub-te pen biakinn leitaw lamah na ding uh a, biakinn tual sungnungteng dimin meiipi a kai hi
Kherub-te' tung panin Topa' minthan'na vang hong paikhia-in biakinn kongah va om hi. Tua ciangin biakinn sungah meiipi hong kai a, biakinn tualah Topa' minthan'na vang taang zeizai hi
Kherub-te' khazap ging pen biakinn tual puanung ciangdongah kiza a, Vanglian Pasian a pau ciangin a awging tawh kibang hi
Kherub-te' nuai-a om leengpeite' kikal panin mei a la dingin Topa in saihadial puan silhpa a sawl ciangin, tua mipa zong va pai-in leengpei khat gei-ah a va ding hi

Tua ciangin kherub khat in a khut zanin amau' kikala om meikhuk sawkin mei-am pawlkhat la a, saihadial puan a silhpa' khutsungah a koih hi. Saihadial puan a silhpa zong tua mei-amte tawi-in a paikhia hi
Tua kherub-te in a kha nuai ciat uhah mihing khut tawh a kibang nei ciat uh hi
Tua kherub-te' gei-ah leengpei khat ciat omin, tua leengpeite suangmanpha bangin tee hi
Tua leengpeite a pianzia kibang kim a, leengpei khat in a kikantanin pei dang khat ciat nei thuah uh hi
Tua kherub-te a pai ciangin kihei kulloin a utna lam peuhpeuh uhah pai thei uh hi. A paina ding lam a nga a pei paina-ah adangte in zui-in kihei tuanlo uh hi
A leengpei kualte a pei kan'na khaute leh a pei buppi dimin mittang om hi
Hih leengpeite pen maang ka muh masakna sungate mah tawh a kibang ahi hi
Tua kherub-te in maitang li ciat nei uh hi. A maitang khatna bawngtal maitang, a nihna mihing maitang, a thumna humpinelkai maitang, a lina muvanlai maitang tawh kibang hi
Hih kherub-te pen Khebar Gun gei-a ka muh ganhingte mah ahi hi. Tua ciangin hih kherub-te leengto uh a
amau a kin uh ciangin a leengpeite in zong a zui uh hi. A leeng dingin a kha a zal uh ciangin zong leengpeite in zui lai uh hi
Kherub-te a khawl ciangin leengpeite khawl a, kherub-te a leen' ciangin leengpeite in zong a zui uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua leengpeite pen kherub-te' khutnuai-ah a om ahi uh hi
Tua ciangin biakinn kong panin Topa' minthan'na vang paikhia-in kherub-te' tung sanah va om hi

Tua bangin ka et laitakin kherub-te in zong a kha uh zalin leilak panin leengto uh a, leengpeite in zong a zui uh hi. Biakinn nisuahna lam kongpi-ah khawl uh a, amaute' tung sanah Israel Pasian' minthan'na vang zong a khawl hi
Hih kherub-te pen, Israel Pasian a kumpi tokhom tawh a pua, Khebar Gun gei-a ka muhte mah hi, ci-in ka thei hi
Amaute in maitang li, kha li, leh a kha nuai ciat uhah mihing khut tawh a kibang khut nei ciat uh hi
Amaute' maitang pen Khebar Gun gei-a ka muhsa maitangte mah tawh kibang teekteek a, a pai uh ciangin a mailam ciat mahah tang takin a pai thei uh hi.
